message:
🐛 Fix pin scroll restore with KeepAlive navigation (#1882)

KeepAlive sets display:none on the old route's content before cleanup
effects run, causing the browser to clamp container.scrollTop. The
cleanup was reading a stale (clamped) value and saving the wrong
scroll position.

Fix: capture scrollTop immediately into a ref on every scroll event
(zero-cost, no reflow). The cleanup effect now reads the ref value
instead of the DOM, preserving the correct position across KeepAlive
navigation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
